features.description: ALBUM RECATEGORIZATION: Read plans/ralph-recategorize.md and execute it fully. Use Lenny MCP tools to validate whether Lenny's 11 JTBD categories cover all 638 pieces. Name each album with 3 catchy Spotify-worthy options. Recategorize all 36 existing songs into the 11 albums. Identify gaps and batch 3 priorities. DONE: content/songs/album-recategorization.md exists with all 5 sections (validated categories, named albums, song recategorization table, gap analysis, completeness check). NOT TOUCH: Do not modify lib/albums.ts or any code files. This is research only. VERIFY: Output file exists, has >100 lines, includes all 11 categories with album name recommendations and a full 36-row song mapping table.
steps: Read plans/ralph-recategorize.md for full instructions
Read content/songs/intention.md for project context
Read content/songs/master-tracker.md for current song list
Use mcp__lennysdata__search_content to sample content across all 11 JTBD categories
Validate categories — do all 638 pieces fit? Any missing categories?
Name each album — 3 options per category, with recommendation
Recategorize all 36 songs into new albums — output as table
Identify gaps — which albums have few songs? Top 3 candidates per album for batch 3
Check completeness — pricing, sales, marketplace, design content
Save output to content/songs/album-recategorization.md
Output file exists and has >100 lines

features.description: GENERATE SONGS (BATCH 4, FIRST 5): Execute the song pipeline for tasks 1-5 in content/songs/batch4/tasks.json. For each song: Phase 1 (Research via Lenny MCP — use mcp__lennysdata__read_content with the source_files listed in the task, extract story/quotes/emotional core, rate, generate hooks, save research brief to content/songs/batch4/research/). Phase 2 (Songwriting — read research brief + ALL quality guides: content/lyric-craft-guide.md, content/brainstorm/lyric-principles.md, content/brainstorm/suno-lyric-tips.md, content/songs/artist-palette.md, content/songs/batch4/feedback.md. Write lyrics using Rick Rubin mode, critique, rewrite, create Suno prompt. Save lyrics to content/songs/batch4/lyrics/ and suno prompt to content/songs/batch4/suno-prompts/). DONE: 5 research briefs, 5 lyric files, 5 suno prompts exist. Each task marked complete in tasks.json. NOT TOUCH: Do not modify any batch1/batch2/batch3 files, do not modify lib/albums.ts.

Read content/brainstorm/lyric-principles.md for songwriting principles

features.description: GENERATE SONGS (BATCH 6, 3 SONGS): Execute the song pipeline for all 3 tasks in content/songs/batch6/tasks.json. For each song: Phase 1 (Research via Lenny MCP — use mcp__lennysdata__read_content with the source_files listed in the task, extract story/quotes/emotional core, rate, generate hooks, save research brief to content/songs/batch6/research/). CRITICAL: These 3 songs must NOT overlap with existing 'Vibe Coding' (batch 1) or 'Rise of Cursor' (batch 5). Focus on Lovable-specific stories.
